content.description:
A guide to Hobson's user-facing features. Everything here is userland — built from regular items on top of the [kernel and viewport](item://c0c0c0c0-0091-0000-0000-000000000000). All of it can be inspected, modified, or replaced.

---

| Feature | What it does | More info |
|---------|-------------|-----------|
| ***Workspace & Organization*** | | |
| [Spatial Canvas](item://ef793c27-2d4b-4c99-b05a-2769db5bc5a9) | Freeform 2D canvas where items appear as draggable, resizable windows. The primary way to work in Hobson. Supports anchoring, minimizing, z-ordering. | [spatial-canvas-view](item://ef793c27-2d4b-4c99-b05a-2769db5bc5a9) |
| [Workspaces](item://4bbe108c-9db9-430d-a65d-7b5a00831bbb) | Container items for grouping related items. Each workspace is typically rendered as a spatial canvas. Navigate into a workspace to make it your root. | [Attachments](item://c0c0c0c0-0005-0000-0000-000000000000) |
| [Tags](item://c0c0c0c0-0021-0000-0000-000000000000) | Any item can act as a tag. Tag items to classify them across hierarchies. Filter by tag in search, or browse via the [Tag Browser](item://05e72011-d70e-4ff3-ac78-fe6b7fc5d884). | [Tags & Classification](item://c0c0c0c0-0021-0000-0000-000000000000) |
| [Sortable Lists](item://69253de7-a08d-40e3-b8da-ec88ee33a25a) | Drag-to-reorder list view for any container. An alternative to the spatial canvas for ordered collections. | [sortable-list-view](item://69253de7-a08d-40e3-b8da-ec88ee33a25a) |
| ***Content*** | | |
| Notes & Markdown | Markdown documents with full formatting, code blocks, and tables. Powered by [hobson-markdown](item://a1b2c3d4-5e6f-7a8b-9c0d-e1f2a3b4c5d6), which extends standard markdown with `item://` links and transclusion. | [note type](item://871ae771-b9b1-4f40-8c7f-d9038bfb69c3) |
| [Transclusion](item://c0c0c0c0-0035-0000-0000-000000000000) | Embed items (or parts of items) inline via `![](item://guid)`. Supports field targeting (`#description`), line ranges (`#code?lines=10-20`), named regions (`#code?region=name`), and live query blocks. | [Transclusion](item://c0c0c0c0-0035-0000-0000-000000000000) |
| [App Pages](item://c0c0c0c0-0038-0000-0000-000000000000) | Grid-based pages for composing interactive UIs from widgets (buttons, sliders, radio groups, markdown blocks). A design mode lets you drag and drop widgets onto the grid. | [App Pages and Widgets](item://c0c0c0c0-0038-0000-0000-000000000000) |
| ***Navigation & Discovery*** | | |
| [Item Palette](item://f1111111-0005-0000-0000-000000000000) | `Ctrl+K` opens a search dialog across all items. Filter by free text, `name:`, or `tag:`. In spatial canvas, `Ctrl+Shift+A` adds an existing item, `Ctrl+Shift+N` creates a new one. | [item-palette](item://f1111111-0005-0000-0000-000000000000) |
| [Navigation](item://c0c0c0c0-0003-0000-0000-000000000000) | URL-based navigation with full browser history support. Each item has a permalink. Navigate into containers, use back/forward, bookmark items. | [Navigation](item://c0c0c0c0-0003-0000-0000-000000000000) |
| [Context Menus](item://c0c0c0c0-0034-0000-0000-000000000000) | Right-click any item for context-sensitive actions: change view, edit, delete, navigate into, add children, inspect, and more. The menu adapts based on item type and context. | [Context Menu](item://c0c0c0c0-0034-0000-0000-000000000000) |
| [Related Items](item://1e9ffc8d-0e0d-4020-9865-b4ca6a05cbae) | Widget showing all relationships for the selected item — parent, children, tags, items that reference it, items of the same type. | [related-items-widget](item://1e9ffc8d-0e0d-4020-9865-b4ca6a05cbae) |
| [Keyboard Shortcuts](item://f1111111-0004-0000-0000-000000000000) | Global shortcuts: `Ctrl+K` (search), `Ctrl+\\` (REPL), `Ctrl+?` (help). In spatial canvas: `Ctrl+Shift+N` (new item), `Ctrl+Shift+A` (add existing). Press `Ctrl+?` for the full list. | [help-dialog](item://f1111111-0006-0000-0000-000000000000) |
| ***Development Tools*** | | |
| [REPL](item://c0c0c0c0-0008-0000-0000-000000000000) | `Ctrl+\\` opens an interactive JavaScript console with full kernel API access. Query, create, and modify items. Persistent history via [REPL sessions](item://f1111111-0003-0001-0000-000000000000). | [REPL](item://c0c0c0c0-0008-0000-0000-000000000000) |
| [System Browser](item://3a36e7d0-a49c-494b-ae32-1a0c92a10c1c) | Smalltalk-inspired multi-pane browser. Browse all types, tags, views, and libraries. Jump to implementations, see type hierarchies, explore the system. | [system-browser](item://3a36e7d0-a49c-494b-ae32-1a0c92a10c1c) |
| [Symbol Browser](item://ac0ac0ac-0008-0000-0000-000000000000) | Search and navigate code symbols (functions, classes, constants) across all code items. Click a symbol to jump to its source. | [Symbol Browser](item://ac0ac0ac-0008-0000-0000-000000000000) |
| [Type Workshop](item://d0d0d0d0-0001-0000-0000-000000000000) | Visual tool for creating and editing type definitions. Automatically generates paired views (editable + readonly) with field specifications. | [type-workshop](item://d0d0d0d0-0001-0000-0000-000000000000) |
| [Element Inspector](item://eeee0000-0000-0000-0000-000000000010) | Click any UI element to see which item and view rendered it, the full render chain, and jump to the source code. | [element-inspector](item://eeee0000-0000-0000-0000-000000000010) |
| [Hob Language](item://c0c0c0c0-0054-0000-0000-000000000000) | A Lisp-like language for writing views and scripts. Hob views are the preferred way to build new views — they use morphdom for efficient reactive updates. | [Hob Language](item://c0c0c0c0-0054-0000-0000-000000000000), [hob-interpreter](item://40b00001-0000-4000-8000-000000000000) |
| ***Data Management*** | | |
| [Import/Export](item://c0c0c0c0-0027-0000-0000-000000000000) | JSON import/export with topological dependency ordering. Imports hot-reload — edit a code item, re-import, and changes take effect immediately. | [Import/Export System](item://c0c0c0c0-0027-0000-0000-000000000000) |
| [Safe Mode](item://33333333-7777-0000-0000-000000000000) | Add `?safe=1` to the URL to boot kernel only. No user code runs, so you can fix or delete broken items. `Ctrl+Shift+S` as an escape hatch from anywhere. | [Safe Mode](item://33333333-7777-0000-0000-000000000000) |
| [Testing](item://c0c0c0c0-0036-0000-0000-000000000000) | Built-in test runner with an assertion library. Tests run inside a [nested instance](item://c0c0c0c0-0037-0000-0000-000000000000) for isolation. | [test-suite](item://7e570002-0000-4000-8000-000000000000), [test-lib](item://7e570001-0000-4000-8000-000000000000) |
| [Error Tracking](item://c0c0c0c0-0023-0000-0000-000000000000) | Errors are automatically captured as items with parsed stack traces. Click a stack frame to jump to the code. View all errors via the [error list](item://e7707000-0000-0000-0000-000000000010). | [Error Handling](item://c0c0c0c0-0023-0000-0000-000000000000) |
| ***Misc*** | | |
| [Theming](item://33333333-8888-0000-0000-000000000000) | oklch-based color system. Change `--base-hue` to shift the entire palette. User CSS items can add custom styles. Hot-reloads on edit. | [kernel:styles](item://33333333-8888-0000-0000-000000000000) |
| [Nested Instances](item://c0c0c0c0-0037-0000-0000-000000000000) | Run Hobson inside Hobson via iframes with isolated storage. Used for testing and sandboxed experimentation. | [Nested Instances](item://c0c0c0c0-0037-0000-0000-000000000000) |
